name: TestPlan
description: A structured document defining the objectives, scope, approach, schedule, and resources for a software testing effort.

id.description: Unique identifier for the test plan.

description.description: High-level description of the testing effort.

project_id.description: Identifier of the project this test plan covers.

status.description: Current status of the test plan.

objectives.description: Goals and objectives of the testing effort.

scope.description: What is in and out of scope for this test plan.

approach.description: The testing approach and methodology to be used.

entry_criteria.description: Conditions that must be met before testing can begin.

exit_criteria.description: Conditions that must be met before testing is considered complete.

test_types.description: Types of testing to be performed.

environments.description: Environments in which testing will be performed.

owner.description: Test lead or owner responsible for this test plan.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the plan was created.

updated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the plan was last updated.

test_cycle_ids.description: References to test cycles associated with this plan.

in_scope.description: Features and components included in the testing scope.

out_of_scope.description: Features and components excluded from the testing scope.
